modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User needs to change font size in Outlook on Windows 10.

full_description_text: The user was trying to adjust the font size in Outlook because it was too small. They mentioned that the text was difficult to read, which was causing some frustration. During the call, they expressed a need for assistance in changing the size of their fonts. The issue is specifically related to the Windows 10 environment.
short_description: User needs to change font size in Outlook on Windows 10.
description: The user was trying to adjust the font size in Outlook because it was too small. They mentioned that the text was difficult to read, which was causing some frustration. During the call, they expressed a need for assistance in changing the size of their fonts. The issue is specifically related to the Windows 10 environment.
